arts.sum: Guardiola’s side squandered yet another position of strength to concede a first-leg deficit in their Champions League play-off tie

arts.ttl: “The victory is deserved” – Carlo Ancelotti satisfied by Real Madrid performance against Manchester City
arts.sum: Real Madrid have the advantage in their Champions League play-off round tie against Manchester City, having won 3-2 at the Etihad Stadium in Tuesday night’s first leg. It means that a draw in next week’s return fixture at the Santiago Bernabeu would be enough for a last 16 place to be secured.
